steps.title: Spot the key distinction
steps.content: The notes contrast two specific materials: Open Ended is made of weathering steel, while Strike: To Roberta and Rudy is made of hot-rolled steel. Since the question asks which choice emphasizes a difference, the correct answer must highlight this material contrast.

steps.title: Apply the distinction to the choices
steps.content: D directly states the two sculptures are made from different types of steel. A frames both as similar large sculptures, while B and C focus on individual sculptures without comparison. That is the correct answer.
